ddls:
CREATE TABLE "educational_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "measure" TEXT /* The name of the educational metric (e.g., Average Progress 8 score) */,
  "time" INTEGER /* The time period the metric is associated with */,
  "time_type" TEXT /* The type of time period (e.g., Academic year) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* The ethnicity of the students */,
  "ethnicity_type" TEXT /* The type of ethnicity group (e.g., All pupils) */,
  "geography" TEXT /* The geographical location of the data */,
  "geography_type" TEXT /* The type of geographical location (e.g., Country, Region, Local Authority) */,
  "ons_geography_code" TEXT /* The ONS geography code for the location */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The gender of the students */,
  "fsm" TEXT /* The Free School Meal (FSM) status of the students */,
  "value" REAL /* The value of the metric */,
  "denominator" INTEGER /* The denominator for the metric value */,
  "lower_confidence_interval" REAL /* The lower confidence interval for the metric value */,
  "upper_confidence_interval" REAL /* The upper confidence interval for the metric value */,
  "metric_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, administrative data) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created or updated the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_metrics_geography FOREIGN KEY ("geography") REFERENCES geographies ("geography_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_metrics_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_metrics_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_metrics_ethnicity FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_metrics_fsm FOREIGN KEY ("fsm") REFERENCES fsm_status ("fsm_status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical location */,
  "geography_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical location */,
  "geography_type" TEXT /* Type of geographical location (e.g., Country, Region, Local Authority) */,
  "ons_geography_code" TEXT /* The ONS geography code for the location */,
  "parent_geography_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent geographical location (e.g., a Local Authority belongs to a Region) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the geographical location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the geography entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the geography entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity (e.g., All pupils) */,
  "ethnicity_type" TEXT /* Type of ethnicity group (e.g., All pupils) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ethnicity entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ethnicity entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., All pupils, Male, Female) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gender entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the gender entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fsm_status" (
  "fsm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FSM status */,
  "fsm_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the FSM status (e.g., All pupils, Eligible, Not eligible) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the FSM status entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the FSM status entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fsm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the researcher account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the researchers table */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource to which the permission applies (e.g., table, view, report) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the educational_metrics table */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES educational_metrics ("metric_id")
)
